content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: header_auth_bypass|spoof_user_context|elevation_via_headers
H: x-user-id|401|authorization|authentication|user-context|privilege
P: verify|drop_hdr|keep_401|spoof_denied|auth_check|header_strip
V: header_injection
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: header_auth_bypass or spoof_user_context or elevation_via_headers.
Hypothesis: x-user-id or 401 or authorization or authentication or user-context or privilege.
Plan: verify or drop the header path or keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied or auth_check or header_strip.
Verify: header_injection.
Answer target: verified session auth only.
